title: centaurea × dobrogensis
intro: Centaurea × dobrogensis, also known as Dobrogean knapweed, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, combining the characteristics of Centaurea nigra and Centaurea pseudosquarrosa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurea × dobrogensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Centaurea × dobrogensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
